269.reason: should be x[qu[rt]][q] instead of x[rt][q] to use the actual vertex number stored in the queue

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 1.0 , reason:  should be x[qu[rt]][q] instead of x[rt][q] to use the actual vertex number stored in the queue
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: rt is the index of the queue head, not the vertex number. It should be x[qu[rt]][q] to correctly access the adjacency matrix of the current vertex being processed.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 1.0 , reason:  rt is the index of the current element in the queue array, not the vertex number itself. It should be x[qu[rt]][q] to correctly access the adjacency matrix row for the vertex being processed.
